items.markdown:
Top-rated inventory management solutions in South Africa include `AI-driven tools and fully integrated ERPs tailored to local business needs` . Solutions vary by scale, with notable options including:[](https://www.capterra.co.za/directory/30006/inventory-management/software) [[1]](https://www.capterra.co.za/directory/30006/inventory-management/software)[[2]](https://embrace.co.za/struggling-to-strike-the-right-balance-between-supply-and-demand/)

- **Sage Accounting:** Widely used locally, it offers seamless VAT tracking, stock management, and custom pricing. Pricing starts at roughly R322/month for small businesses.[](https://www.sage.com/en-za/inventory-management/) [[1]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/inventory-management/)[[2]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/sage-business-cloud/accounting/features/stock-management/)[[3]](https://quickbooks.intuit.com/za/inventory-management-software/)
- **Xero South Africa:** Ideal for small to medium enterprises (SMEs), it integrates stock control with accounting to automate purchase orders and prevent stockouts.[](https://www.xero.com/za/accounting-software/manage-inventory/) [[1]](https://www.xero.com/za/accounting-software/manage-inventory/)[[2]](https://www.smart-it.co.za/features/stock-control-inventory-management/)
- **Embrace ERP:** A highly scalable, local enterprise solution favored by medium to large businesses requiring multi-location warehousing, and batch or serial tracking.[](https://embrace.co.za/struggling-to-strike-the-right-balance-between-supply-and-demand/) [[1]](https://embrace.co.za/struggling-to-strike-the-right-balance-between-supply-and-demand/)

Explore and compare platforms via the [Capterra South Africa Inventory Software Directory](https://www.capterra.co.za/directory/30006/inventory-management/software) to find user reviews and software tailored to local market needs.[[1]](https://www.capterra.com/resources/what-is-an-inventory-management-system/)

expanded_element.title: What is the 80/20 inventory management rule? - Katana MRP
expanded_element.description: The 80/20 inventory rule is the tactic of prioritizing the 20% of your inventory that accounts for 80% of your business's profit. Manufacturers usually apply this inventory rule when auditing their inventory to reduce carrying costs and lead time.
